data.title: Seazen Group Reports 2024 Financial Results with Increased Revenue and Reduced Borrowings
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Seazen Group Ltd. ( (HK:1030) ).

Seazen Group Limited reported its annual financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024, highlighting a revenue of approximately RMB89,227 million, with a notable 13.9% year-on-year increase in revenue from commercial property management services and rental income. The company achieved a gross profit of RMB14,984 million and a net profit attributable to equity holders of RMB491 million. Seazen also reduced its total borrowings by 8.6% year-on-year, with a net debt-to-equity ratio of 53.8%, indicating a strengthened financial position.

More about Seazen Group Ltd.

Seazen Group Limited, incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operates in the real estate industry with a focus on commercial property management services and rental income.

data.title: Dynagreen Reallocates Bond Proceeds to Bolster Operations
data.description:
Dynagreen Environmental Protection Group Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1330) ) has provided an update.

Dynagreen Environmental Protection Group Co., Ltd. announced the reallocation of surplus proceeds from its A Share Convertible Bonds to working capital. The company has utilized approximately RMB2.251 billion of the proceeds for various projects, including waste-to-energy initiatives, with a remaining unused amount of RMB9.309 million. This strategic reallocation is expected to support the company’s operational efficiency and financial stability.

More about Dynagreen Environmental Protection Group Co., Ltd. Class H

Dynagreen Environmental Protection Group Co., Ltd. is a joint stock limited liability company based in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the environmental protection industry. The company primarily focuses on waste-to-energy projects, providing sustainable solutions for waste management.

data.title: Yangtze Optical Fibre Proposes 2025 Employee Share Ownership Plan
data.description:
An update from Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable Joint Stock Co ( (HK:6869) ) is now available.

Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable Joint Stock Co has proposed the adoption of a 2025 Employee Share Ownership Plan (ESOP) to improve corporate governance and incentivize core employees. The plan involves repurchasing A Shares and transferring them to eligible participants, including directors and senior management, without issuing new shares. This initiative is subject to shareholder approval and aims to align employee and shareholder interests while enhancing company performance.

More about Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable Joint Stock Co

Yangtze Optical Fibre and Cable Joint Stock Co is a company based in the People’s Republic of China, primarily engaged in the production and distribution of optical fiber and cable products. The company focuses on enhancing its corporate governance and performance through strategic employee incentive plans.

data.title: Raffles Interior Ltd. Reports 2024 Annual Results with Notable Revenue Decline
data.description:
An announcement from Raffles Interior Ltd. ( (HK:1376) ) is now available.

Raffles Interior Ltd. announced its audited annual results for the year ended December 31, 2024, reporting a significant drop in revenue from S$91,181,000 in 2023 to S$47,120,000 in 2024. The company faced a comprehensive loss of S$4,537,000, mainly due to losses from discontinued operations, impacting the overall profitability and market positioning.

More about Raffles Interior Ltd.

Raffles Interior Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the interior design and construction industry. The company focuses on providing comprehensive interior solutions, including design, project management, and construction services.

data.title: Suxin Joyful Life Services Reports Revenue Growth but Decline in Profitability for 2024
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Suxin Joyful Life Services Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2152) ).

Suxin Joyful Life Services Co., Ltd. reported a 27.5% increase in revenue for the year ending December 31, 2024, reaching approximately RMB924.6 million. Despite this growth, the company’s profit decreased by 17.4% to RMB66.2 million, with a decline in net profit margin from 11.0% to 7.2%. The company also expanded its contracted gross floor area by 8.9 million square meters, and the board recommended a final cash dividend of RMB0.3602 per share. These results highlight the company’s revenue growth but also indicate challenges in maintaining profitability.

More about Suxin Joyful Life Services Co., Ltd. Class H

Suxin Joyful Life Services Co., Ltd. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the service industry. The company focuses on providing property management services, with a significant market presence indicated by its substantial contracted gross floor area.

data.title: Anaergia to Build Major Waste Treatment Plant in Fermo, Italy
data.description:
Anaergia, Inc. ( (TSE:ANRG) ) has provided an announcement.

Anaergia Inc., in partnership with Edil Alta S.r.l., has been awarded a contract by the City of Fermo, Italy, to construct a waste treatment plant featuring an anaerobic digestion facility. This facility will process over 35,000 tons of organic waste annually, producing approximately 31,400 MWh of biomethane to be converted into compressed natural gas for vehicle fueling. The project, valued at C$45.5 million, is expected to be completed by mid-2026 and will generate significant revenue for Anaergia, enhancing its position in the renewable energy sector.

More about Anaergia, Inc.

Anaergia is a pioneering technology company in the renewable natural gas (RNG) sector, with over 250 patents dedicated to converting organic waste into sustainable solutions such as RNG, fertilizer, and water. The company is committed to addressing greenhouse gas emissions through cost-effective processes and offers an integrated portfolio of end-to-end solutions, including solid waste processing, wastewater treatment, organics recovery, anaerobic digestion, and biomethane production.

data.title: Goldwind Proposes Bond and Asset-Backed Securities Issuance to Boost Financing
data.description:
Xinjiang Goldwind Science & Technology Co ( (HK:2208) ) just unveiled an update.

Goldwind Science & Technology Co., Ltd. has announced a proposal to issue bonds and asset-backed securities both domestically and internationally, with an aggregate issue size not exceeding RMB5 billion. This strategic move aims to expand the company’s financing channels, optimize its financial structure, and support its business development needs. The proceeds from these securities will be used for daily operations, project investments, and loan repayments. The authorization for this issuance will be valid for 24 months, allowing the company to adjust its financial strategies according to market conditions.

More about Xinjiang Goldwind Science & Technology Co

Xinjiang Goldwind Science & Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading company in the renewable energy sector, primarily focusing on the production of wind turbines and related technology. The company is based in China and is known for its innovative solutions in wind power generation, contributing significantly to the global energy market.

data.title: Asia Television Holdings Announces New Share Placement to Raise HK$20.56 Million
data.description:
An update from Asia Television Holdings Limited ( (HK:0707) ) is now available.

Asia Television Holdings Limited announced a new share placement under a general mandate, involving the issuance of up to 262,208,000 new shares at a price of HK$0.080 per share. This placement, facilitated by Asia Pacific Securities Limited, aims to raise approximately HK$20.56 million in net proceeds, which will be used as general working capital for the company. The share placement represents a discount to recent trading prices, and its completion is contingent on certain conditions being met, highlighting a strategic move to bolster the company’s financial position.

More about Asia Television Holdings Limited

Asia Television Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily involved in the media and entertainment industry. The company focuses on television broadcasting and related services, catering to a diverse audience in the Asian market.

data.title: Charmacy Pharmaceutical Declares Final Dividend for 2024
data.description:
The latest update is out from Charmacy Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2289) ).
